response.justification: Strong senior IC with broad full-stack and open-source experience, Linux/Unix comfort, and a long-running self-founded GIS platform showing architecture and ownership instincts. However, the role requires executive-level leadership with formal team management and German C1, both of which are not evidenced — German is listed as Basic, which is a hard miss against a stated minimum, and prior titles are individual-contributor rather than Head of Development.
strengths: Deep multi-stack engineering across web, embedded, and Linux/open-source ecosystems
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates architecture, Kubernetes deployment, and product ownership
Strong craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, mentoring via courses and dojos
concerns: German listed as Basic, far below the required C1 threshold
No formal Head-of-Development or team-lead title; leadership shown via mentoring/workshops only
Light explicit evidence of UML modeling and formal requirements management

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering breadth and open-source/Linux fit
Lacks formal leadership title for executive role
